appliedUpdates.description: Documented backend env loading, local PostgreSQL usage, and Backend API flow isolation guidance for refresh-driven validation.
Corrected backend start command to load .env with node --env-file=.env server/index.js during validation setup.

executionNotes: Task-based flow validator launches failed because custom droids resolved to invalid model custom:GPT-5.4-(XHigh)-3, so the main validator ran the hotfix API flow directly and wrote the equivalent flow report.
